examples: I rang the hotel and spoke to Louie.
Louie didn't want to say anything to influences my decision.
Japan's dolphin-hunting industry gets skewered in The Cove, a just-released documentary by director Louie Psihoyos.
And Quins' bad night was complete when prop Louie McCarthy-Scarsbrook went off with a broken wrist.
But he's having a hard time letting go of Louie the lizard and friends.
